title: Item interactions
description: Makes interacting with items a bit neat
body:
Changes items in the inventory when grabbing them

Also changes the items according to their stored block state if given with one (a powered redstone lamp, a toggled copper bulb, etc)

![V2.0 preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/refs/heads/main/other/texture%20packs/gallery/2.0%40preview.webp)
![Item interactions!](https://github.com/mineland-2048/mineland-2048.github.io/blob/main/other/texture%20packs/gallery/no.gif?raw=true)

(Particles need the [Item interactions mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-interactions-mod))

Currently implemented:
> 1.0
- Chests and chest minecart (no chest boats yet)
- Redstone lamp
- All copper bulbs
- Comparator, repeater, redstone torch and lever
- The crafter
- All furnaces
- Pistons
- Sculk sensors and the shrieker
- Daylight sensor
- Tnt and tnt minecart

> 1.1
- Chest boats
- All trapdoors
- All fence gates
- Enchanting table
- Armor stand

> 1.2
- All Doors

> 1.3
- Chiseled bookshelves
- Buttons
- Fences
- Walls
- Sculk catalyst
- Pressure plates
- Small and big dripleaf
- Lectern
- Lightning rod

> 1.4
- Observer
- Mushroom blocks
- Bells
- All signs
- Lantern and soul lantern
- Snowy grass, mycelium and podzol blocks

> 1.5
- Campfires
- Creaking heart
- Waterlogged and powered states
- [POLYTONE ONLY] Custom creative tabs for certain items

> 1.6
+ Falling leaves
+ Spawn eggs

> 2.0

Particles (Requires the [Item interactiions mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-interactions-mod)): 
- Leaves
- Firefly bushes
- Buckets
- Torches, repeaters and comparato
- Sculk sensors
- Campfires
- Note blocks and jukeboxes
- Pots
- Dispensers, droppers and crafter
- Open Eyeblossom
- Enchanting table
- Brewing stand
- End rod
- Tnt and tnt minecart
- End crystal
- Firework rockets
- Ender eyes
- Soul sand and soil
